articles.description: Manchester United are left furious over "astonishing" refereeing decisions as two penalties were given  and one was not in their draw at Bournemouth.
articles.title: Manchester United fury at 'astonishing' penalty decisions

articles.description: Trent Alexander-Arnold's omission from Thomas Tuchel's biggest England squad is the latest blow to his stop-start international career and casts huge doubt on his hopes of playing at the World Cup.
articles.title: Trent Alexander-Arnold's England World Cup hopes in doubt, so what now for Real Madrid defender?

articles.description: Defending champion Jeremiah Azu narrowly misses out on a medal in the men's 60m final at the World Athletics Indoor Championships in Poland.
articles.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: Jeremiah Azu narrowly misses out on 60m medal

articles.description: Thomas Tuchel's expanded England squad offers hope to forgotten men but shows problems before the World Cup, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: England squad: Thomas Tuchel's latest Three Lions squad analysed

articles.description: Former boxing world champion Ricky Hatton was found "unresponsive" at his home in September.
articles.title: Coroner 'not satisfied' Ricky Hatton intended to take own life

articles.description: British number two Jack Draper is knocked out of the Miami Open in the second round by Reilly Opelka, but Katie Boulter progresses as her opponent Clara Tauson retires injured.
articles.title: Miami Open: Jack Draper knocked out in second round, Katie Boulter through

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from AFC Bournemouth vs Manchester United in the Premier League
articles.title: AFC Bournemouth vs Manchester United LIVE: Premier League live text, team news, stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson will not face Brighton on Saturday because of injury and has withdrawn from the Brazil squad for their friendlies later this month.
articles.title: Alisson: Liverpool goalkeeper to miss Brighton match and out of Brazil squad because of injury

articles.description: BBC Sport explores whether the Women's Super League would be ready for Fifa's new female coach requirements.
articles.title: WSL: Would it be ready for Fifa's female coach requirements?

articles.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan creates more snooker history by making the sport's highest-ever professional break with a 153 at the World Open in Yushan.
articles.title: World Open: Ronnie O'Sullivan makes highest-ever professional break with historic 153
